words.meaning: to go on foot (unidirectional) — one specific trip in one direction
words.exampleMeaning: I am going to school (right now, on foot).

words.meaning: to go on foot (multidirectional) — repeated trips or round trips
words.example: Я хожу в школу каждый день.
words.exampleMeaning: I go to school every day.

words.meaning: to go by vehicle (unidirectional) — one specific trip
words.example: Мы едем на работу на автобусе.
words.exampleMeaning: We are going to work by bus (right now).

words.meaning: to go by vehicle (multidirectional) — repeated trips
words.example: Она ездит в Москву каждый месяц.
words.exampleMeaning: She goes to Moscow every month.

words.meaning: to run (unidirectional) — running in one direction right now
words.exampleMeaning: The boy is running to his mom.

words.meaning: to run (multidirectional) — running around, habitual running
words.example: Я бегаю в парке каждое утро.
words.exampleMeaning: I run in the park every morning.

words.meaning: to fly (unidirectional) — flying in one direction right now
words.exampleMeaning: The plane is flying to Paris.

words.meaning: to fly (multidirectional) — flying around, repeated flights
to swim/sail (unidirectional) — swimming in one direction
words.exampleMeaning: The boat is sailing along the river.

words.example: Дети плавают в бассейне каждую субботу.
words.exampleMeaning: The children swim in the pool every Saturday.

words.meaning: to carry (unidirectional, on foot) — carrying something somewhere right now
words.exampleMeaning: He is carrying a heavy bag.

words.meaning: to carry (multidirectional) — carrying repeatedly or wearing
to lead/drive (unidirectional) — leading someone somewhere right now
words.exampleMeaning: Mom is taking the child to kindergarten.

words.meaning: to lead/drive (multidirectional) — leading repeatedly, driving (a car)
to transport (unidirectional) — transporting somewhere right now
words.exampleMeaning: The truck is transporting goods to the store.

words.example: Эта компания возит грузы по всей стране.
words.exampleMeaning: This company transports cargo across the whole country.

items.sentence: Я ___ в школу каждый день. (go on foot, repeated)
Самолёт ___ в Москву. (fly, right now, one direction)

items.question: Which verb means 'going on foot right now in one direction'?
'Я бегаю в парке каждое утро' — why use 'бегать' here?
What is the multidirectional pair of 'везти'?
